hooks.command: if [ -d .venv ]; then echo "UV venv ready: $(.venv/bin/python --version)"; else echo "No .venv found. Run: uv sync"; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */pyproject.toml|*/uv.lock) echo "🔄 Syncing UV dependencies..." && uv sync ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
